steps.title: Identify the key contrast signal
steps.content: The key clue is the contrast that emerges: she avoided [blank] designs, but instead explored innovative forms and daring hues. The blank must describe something conventional and standard—the opposite of innovation and daring.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Traditional describes designs rooted in established conventions—exactly what opposes the innovation and daring she pursued. The other options either name what she actually embraced (creative, bold) or have no contextual fit (understandable). That matches choice C — C is correct.
